title: Better Fuels
description: A Minecraft beta 1.7.3 mod that improves smelting: Buckets are no longer consumed. More fuels are added like in newer versions.
body: A Mod for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 that adds more fuels for furnaces from later versions. Also buckets do not get consumed when using a lava bucket as fuel. Requires StationAPI. Fuels added are: Wooden tools, wool, jukeboxes, noteblocks, crafting tables, chests, bookshelds, wooden pressure plates, ladders, dead bushes, fishing rods, bows, boats, signs, bowls and wooden trapdoors
